article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.3. Burnaby Procedure Bylaw Update February 2026 2026.02.10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on updates to Burnaby's rules for how advisory bodies are managed
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on proposed changes to the Burnaby Procedure Bylaw that would clarify how the rules (called Terms of Reference) for City advisory bodies are created and updated — requiring the Mayor to lead that process, with review by a Council committee before any changes go to Council for approval.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the public notice posted on Burnaby's website and eNewsletter to see the proposed changes before Council votes.
